overview.description: The Kurv Silver Enhanced Income ETF (KSLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in silver commodities. The fund is actively managed, seeking to maximize total return through investments in silver, silver bullion-related ETPs, and derivatives. The fund aims to outperform physical silver. KSLV was launched on Sep 29, 2025 and is issued by Kurv.
